fields.acceptance_criteria: Ticket-viewer runs as Leptos WASM app; reuses viewer-api-leptos for layout/sidebar/theme/GPU; domain-specific: workspace picker, ticket tree, ticket description viewer, dependency graph; uses ticket-api Rust crate for backend
fields.title: Port: ticket-viewer Leptos frontend

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. New crate at tools/viewer/ticket-viewer/frontend-leptos/ depending on viewer-api-leptos. 2. Tri-pane layout: left sidebar (workspace picker + ticket tree grouped by state), center (tabbed description/toml), right (dependency graph with ResizeHandle). 3. Dependency graph uses WgpuOverlay GPU pipeline with ticket-specific node rendering: state-colored badges, ticket card overlays (title, state, type). 4. Full graph interaction: pan, zoom, drag nodes to rearrange, click node to open ticket details in center panel. 5. SVG fallback GraphView for browsers without WebGPU. 6. Live SSE streaming via /api/stream — real-time graph updates when tickets change. 7. Ticket tree: grouped by state (new/in-refinement/ready/in-implementation/closed/cancelled), sort and filter controls. 8. Workspace picker dropdown from /api/workspaces. 9. Ticket content: two tabs — description (markdown via pulldown-cmark + syntect) and ticket (TOML display). 10. All 10 API endpoints wired: workspaces, tickets list/detail/description, edges, subgraph, topgraph, health, stream. 11. Subgraph fetch: direction=both, depth=2, edge_kind=depends_on for dependency visualization.
fields.interview_answers: Q1: Reuse WgpuOverlay GPU pipeline with ticket-specific node rendering (state-colored badges, ticket cards). Q2: Full SSE streaming via /api/stream for live ticket graph updates. Q3: Full interaction — pan/zoom/drag to rearrange nodes + click to open ticket details.
